# CrestFlow Digital

> CrestFlow Digital is a solo GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) audit consultancy founded by Richard Rogers, a United States Marine Corps veteran and former cyber threat analyst. CrestFlow audits how AI assistants — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Bing Copilot — find, understand, and cite small and veteran-owned businesses, and delivers a prioritized action plan to improve that visibility.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://crestflow.io/): Overview of GEO audit services, pricing, and founder background.
- [Services](https://crestflow.io/services.html): Full GEO Audit ($500, 1 week), Audit + Growth Track ($1,000, 4 weeks), Monthly GEO Monitoring, AI Deployment, and Custom AI Chatbots.
- [About](https://crestflow.io/about.html): Founder Richard Rogers — USMC Intelligence Analyst, cyber threat analyst, Virginia-based, serves small and veteran-owned businesses nationwide.
- [Contact](https://crestflow.io/contact.html): Contact form and direct email for audit inquiries.
- [SEO vs GEO: What Changed When ChatGPT Became the New Google](https://crestflow.io/seo-vs-geo.html): Explains the difference between traditional SEO and Generative Engine Optimization, with cited data on zero-click search trends and AI citation patterns.

## Services

- GEO Audit ($500): AI visibility score across 5 platforms, schema markup audit, platform readiness check, competitor snapshot, written action plan, 30-minute review call. Delivered in 5 business days.
- Audit + Growth Track ($1,000): Full audit plus two follow-up re-audits at 2 and 4 weeks tracking progress.
- Monthly GEO Monitoring: Recurring re-audits tracking score changes as AI platforms update.
- AI Deployment: Custom n8n workflows and AI agents deployed to client accounts.
- Custom AI Chatbots: Website widgets and Discord bots powered by Claude or GPT.

## About

CrestFlow Digital is a solo consultancy based in Virginia, founded by Richard Rogers. Richard served in the United States Marine Corps as an Intelligence Analyst and later worked in cyber threat analysis before founding CrestFlow to help small businesses improve their visibility to AI search systems. The consultancy specializes in veteran-owned businesses but serves any small business owner focused on running their operation rather than managing their online presence.

## Contact

- Email: Richard@crestflow.io
- Location: Virginia, USA
- Website: https://crestflow.io
